title: XAT Result 2026 - Xavier Aptitude Test MBA and PGDM Results (OUT)

detail.title: XAT Result 2026 - Xavier Aptitude Test MBA and PGDM Results (OUT)
detail.short_info: XAT Result 2026 : Xavier Aptitude Test Result 2026 has been released on xatonline.in. Here is the direct Link to check your MBA and PGDM Results Online.

sections.heading: XAT Result 2026 - Xavier Aptitude Test MBA and PGDM Results (OUT)

content.text: XAT Result 2026: Xavier Aptitude Test has declared the MBA and PGDM results for on xatonline.in. Students can check their XAT results 2026 online by entering roll number/registration number. Download your XAT mark sheet PDF using the direct link below.

items: Result Status: Released
Exam Name: MBA and PGDM
University: Xavier Aptitude Test (XAT)
Result Available At: xatonline.in
Documents Required: Roll Number/Registration Number

sections.heading: XAT Result 2026 Direct Link - Check Here
How to Check XAT Result 2026 Online?

content.text: Students can check their XAT result 2026 for MBA and PGDM by following these simple steps:

items: Visit Official Website: Go to xatonline.in
Find Results Section: Click on "Results" or "Examination" tab on homepage
Select Your Exam: Choose MBA and PGDM from the list
Enter Details: Input your Roll Number and Registration Number
Submit & View: Click "Submit" to view your XAT result 2026
Download: Save/print your mark sheet PDF for future reference

content.text: To check your XAT results 2026, students must have the following details ready:

items: Roll Number (as mentioned on admit card)
Registration Number or Application Number
Date of Birth (if required)
Course and Semester details

content.text: After checking your XAT result 2026, follow these steps to download your mark sheet:

items: View your result on the screen
Click on "Download Mark Sheet" or "Print" button
Save the PDF file to your device
Take multiple printouts for official use
Verify all details (name, roll number, marks) are correct
